pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies the agent acts as an embedded software engineer.
O*NET database maps Embedded Software Engineer to Software Developers (15-1252.00).
Task context involves IoT drifting buoys and salinity/temperature parsing for an oceanographic research institute.
setup_task.sh generates this file containing the hidden evaluation telemetry data.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetically generated data created via setup_task.sh. The agent operates as an Embedded Software Engineer (O*NET 15-1252.00) in the Oceanographic Tech industry. The target hidden telemetry data used by the verifier is correctly located at /var/lib/app/ground_truth/hidden_telemetry.json, containing exactly 4 valid NMEA sentences, 2 salinity records, 3 temperature records, and 2 battery records.
